vulnerability.reference: Engineers over-rely on synthetic depth data, missing subtle violations that cause models to ignore safety-critical depth cues.
vulnerability.generated: Perception engineers lack automated depth-consistency validation, allowing physically implausible frames to enter training undetected.

impact.reference: Deployment of flawed perception systems leading to real-world accidents and liability.
impact.generated: Autonomous driving perception models inherit depth errors, degrading real-world scene understanding and increasing collision risk.

dose_response.reference: Conditionally-controlled generation misaligns to depth constraints; engineers' over-reliance on synthetic data misses depth violations, causing flawed perception systems that lead to real-world accidents.
dose_response.generated: Conditionally-controlled consistency generation with misalignment to input conditions, through perception engineers training on synthetic depth-conditioned data, triggers lack of automated depth-consistency validation, leading to autonomous driving perception models inheriting depth errors, degrading real-world scene understanding and increasing collision risk.
